# Handheld Settings Lab

Handheld Settings Lab publishes handheld PC game settings, calculators, and gear guides.

Core sections:
- /steam-deck-settings/
- /rog-ally-settings/
- /legion-go-settings/
- /calculators/
- /gear/
- /guides/

Recent guide:
- /guides/rog-ally-x-accessories-buying-checklist/ — spec-based ROG Ally X buying order for 65W charging, power banks, docks, cases, screen protection, microSD cards, and travel.

Editorial guardrails: do not fabricate benchmark data, test claims, affiliate relationships, or official affiliations.
